name: sutra
description: Orchestrator for claude-skills-pack — unifies code_assist, sb, and unabridged behind one bridged command surface. Owns the capability registry, the artifact interchange schema, the cross-plugin recall fusion, and the verify→lesson→recall feedback loop. Members stay fully standalone; sutra makes them cooperate. Backed by a zero-dep Node CLI, deterministic self-tests, and a session hook.
